positive: Minimalist stylized forest animal silhouette composition, featuring a majestic howling wolf and a curious fox leaping under a crescent moon. The style is a blend of ethereal graphic design and Nordic folklore, rendered with strong black ink against a clean, negative white background. The composition must be centered and highly contrasting, suitable for a single-color apparel print. Include subtle geometric line elements (like constellations or stylized forest growth) surrounding the main silhouettes to add depth. Dramatic, cool color palette only visible as an outline or wash in key areas (deep indigo and slate grey), but the core artwork should be high-contrast black on white. Clean edges, perfect symmetry, and bold graphic appeal.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low detail, messy, cluttered, poor anatomy, extra limbs, realistic photography, photo, solid color fill, gradient, gradient background, complex scene, 3d, noise
